inputs.label: Race Distance
inputs.businessContext: The distance of the recent race used to calculate VDOT.

businessContext_i18n.en: The distance of the recent race used to calculate VDOT.
businessContext_i18n.tr: VDOT hesaplamasında kullanılan son yarışın mesafesi.
businessContext_i18n.de: Die Distanz des letzten Rennens, die zur Berechnung des VDOT verwendet wird.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Distance de la course récente utilisée pour calculer le VDOT.
businessContext_i18n.es: Distancia de la carrera reciente utilizada para calcular el VDOT.
businessContext_i18n.ar: مسافة السباق الأخير المستخدم لحساب VDOT.

inputs.label: Race Time (minutes)
inputs.businessContext: The whole minutes component of the race time.

businessContext_i18n.en: The whole minutes component of the race time.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Partie minutes entières du temps de course.
businessContext_i18n.es: Componente de minutos enteros del tiempo de carrera.

inputs.label: Race Time (seconds)
inputs.businessContext: The seconds component of the race time.

businessContext_i18n.en: The seconds component of the race time.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Partie secondes du temps de course.
businessContext_i18n.es: Componente de segundos del tiempo de carrera.

inputs.label: Target Distance
inputs.businessContext: The distance for which to predict a race time using the calculated VDOT.

businessContext_i18n.en: The distance for which to predict a race time using the calculated VDOT.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Hesaplanan VDOT kullanılarak yarış süresi tahmini yapılacak mesafe.
businessContext_i18n.de: Die Distanz, für die eine Rennzeit mit dem berechneten VDOT vorhergesagt werden soll.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Distance pour laquelle prédire un temps de course en utilisant le VDOT calculé.
businessContext_i18n.es: Distancia para la cual predecir un tiempo de carrera usando el VDOT calculado.
businessContext_i18n.ar: المسافة التي سيتم التنبؤ بزمن السباق لها باستخدام VDOT المحسوب.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
